case_title: ANGELL, PAIGE L. vs. BAE, YOUNG IND & DBA UPTOWN CLEANERS AND MODERN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELL, PAIGE L. AS TO DEFENDANT BAE, YOUNG IND & DBA UPTOWN CLEANERS AND MODERN CLEANERS
